infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 15:15, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 26 Date 05 June 2026 Time 14:57 No / Driver 16 - Charles Le

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 15:15, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 26
Date 05 June 2026
Time 14:57
No / Driver 16 - Charles Leclerc
Reason Alleged breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 16 allegedly
impeding Car 30 in turn18 at 14:18.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
